content.claim: In 2016, school directors and county self-government associations explicitly flagged risks of closure or consolidation via centralized school-center formation, but no formal consultation or appeals mechanism was reported to exist at that time.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Implementation planning lens
limitations: Single year snapshot; no longitudinal data on consultation mechanisms before or after 2016
Attribution of relief felt by mayors to absence of consultation is indirect
No documentation of whether informal consultation occurred outside formal channels
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
